name: keycloak-event
description: Parses Keycloak identity provider event logs

test_samples.description: LOGIN_ERROR event is normalized to a failure marker
test_samples.input: 2024-01-15 12:00:00,123 WARN  [org.keycloak.events] (default task-1) type=LOGIN_ERROR, realmId=master, clientId=account, userId=abc-123, ipAddress=203.0.113.5, error=invalid_user_credentials

test_samples.description: successful LOGIN event is left intact (no failure marker)
test_samples.input: 2024-01-15 12:01:00,456 INFO  [org.keycloak.events] (default task-2) type=LOGIN, realmId=master, clientId=account, userId=def-456, ipAddress=198.51.100.9
